exercises.title: Complete Bell State Toolkit
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive toolkit for Bell state manipulation.
tasks: Implement all four Bell states with proper normalization
Create transformation functions between any pair of Bell states
Verify orthonormality of the Bell basis
Calculate density matrices and partial traces
Visualize correlations in different measurement bases
hints: Use tensor products for two-qubit operations

exercises.title: Quantum Teleportation Simulator
exercises.description: Implement full quantum teleportation protocol with analysis.
tasks: Teleport arbitrary single-qubit states
Handle all four BSM outcomes with correct corrections
Calculate fidelity with and without corrections
Extend to mixed state inputs
Add noisy channel effects
hints: Mixed states: use density matrix formalism
Noise: apply Kraus operators to shared state

exercises.title: Bell State Measurement Comparison
tasks: Implement circuit-based BSM (CNOT + H)
Simulate linear optics BSM with success/failure
Add hyperentanglement-assisted BSM
Compare success rates and resource costs
Analyze effect of BSM efficiency on protocols
exercises.expectedOutput: BSM comparison tool with protocol impact analysis

exercises.title: Superdense Coding Implementation
tasks: Encode 2 classical bits using Pauli operations
Transmit one qubit to receiver
Decode via Bell state measurement
Calculate capacity vs noise level
Compare with classical transmission
hints: Classical limit: 1 bit per transmitted system
